title: rhododendron citriniflorum subsp. horaeum
intro: Rhododendron citriniflorum subsp. horaeum is a subspecies of flowering plant, specifically a type of rhododendron native to the Himalayas, characterized by its bright yellow flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of this plant are believed to include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Rhododendron citriniflorum subsp. horaeum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as in the form of a decoction, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
